description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk:8-jdk Docker image, defining variables ANDROID_HOME, ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS_CHECKSUM, ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS_VERSION, and stages test, quality, build, with a global before_script that extracts ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK and ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS from app/build.gradle, prints CI job and runner info, downloads and verifies the Android SDK tools zip, unpacks it, adds tools to PATH, installs platform-tools, the appropriate Android platform, build-tools, and Google Maven repositories via sdkmanager, runs sdkmanager --update, and makes gradlew executable. In the build stage add an android_build job that runs ./gradlew clean assembleRelease and always publishes the generated APKs and mapping files from app/build/outputs/apk/ and app/build/outputs/mapping/ as an artifact named build_${CI_PROJECT_NAME}_${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME}_${CI_JOB_NAME}_${CI_JOB_ID}. In the test stage add an android_test_implementation job (tagged do) that sets EMULATOR_IMAGE based on ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK, installs the emulator and the system image via sdkmanager, updates SDK components, creates an AVD named test, starts the emulator headlessly, waits for the boot animation to stop with a timeout loop, sends a keyevent to unlock, then runs ./gradlew connectedAndroidTest, and always stores the Android test reports from app/build/reports/androidTests/ as an artifact named reports_${CI_PROJECT_NAME}_${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME}_${CI_JOB_NAME}_${CI_JOB_ID}. Also in the test stage add a test_implementation job that runs ./gradlew test and always stores unit test reports from app/build/reports/tests/ as an artifact named reports_${CI_PROJECT_NAME}_${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME}_${CI_JOB_NAME}_${CI_JOB_ID}. In the quality stage add a gradlew_lint job that runs ./gradlew lint and always stores the lint reports from app/build/reports/ as an artifact named reports_${CI_PROJECT_NAME}_${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME}_${CI_JOB_NAME}_${CI_JOB_ID}.
